channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Global economic risks from Strait of Hormuz closure
item.description: Economists are warning that a prolonged closure of the Strait of Hormuz could trigger a global recession. The 28 February 2026 pre-emptive strike by the US and Israel on Iran, followed by counterattac...

item.title: North Korea Fires Unidentified Projectile Despite Recent Peace Talks Rejection
item.description: On 14th March 2026, South Korea's defence ministry reported that North Korea fired at least one unidentified projectile eastwards. This incident comes shortly after Pyongyang rejected recent peace ini...

item.title: Mixed reactions among Los Angeles’ Iranian community to U.S. strikes on Iran
item.description: In Los Angeles—particularly in areas like Westwood and Beverly Hills, home to the largest Iranian diaspora outside Iran—many members of the community have mixed feelings about the ongoing war in Iran ...

item.title: Authorities Issue Flood Advisory for Pinkerton Residents
item.description: Residents of Pinkerton, Ontario, are being advised to take precautions as a flood warning has been issued for the area. Rising water levels in local rivers and streams, caused by recent heavy rainfall...

item.title: US Bombing Targets Military Sites on Iran's Kharg Island Amid Rising Tensions
item.description: The US military has carried out a significant bombing operation on Iran's Kharg Island, which manages nearly all of the country's crude oil exports. This move comes amid heightened tensions in the reg...

item.title: Nigeria’s Power Supply May Get Worse Due to Gas Shortage and Heavy Debt Crisis
item.description: The electricity matter for Nigeria don take another bad turn as officials warn say the light situation fit get worse soon. According to Pulse Nigeria, gas suppliers don stop service to many thermal po...

item.title: U.S. Strikes Kharg Island, Iran’s Key Oil Export Hub, Amid Gulf Tensions
item.description: On 14th March 2026, the United States conducted a major attack on Kharg Island, which is considered Iran’s crown jewel in the Persian Gulf, targeting all military installations, according to a social ...

item.title: Toyin Abraham Advises Timini Egbuson to Stay Neutral in Politics After Her Own Experience Supporting Tinubu
item.description: Popular Nollywood actress Toyin Abraham don give strong advice to her colleague, actor Timini Egbuson, say make him no dey involve himself for politics at all. She talk this one while she dey explain ...

item.title: African Media Encouraged to Report Solutions for Continental Challenges
item.description: The article talks about how African media should shift focus from just reporting conflicts to also offering solutions for issues affecting the continent. This comes amid global tensions from the ongoi...

item.title: Joey Santiago on Pixies’ Journey and Their Long-Awaited Manila Homecoming
item.description: Ahead of their first-ever show in Manila on May 10, 2026, Pixies guitarist Joey Santiago opened up about the band’s enduring influence, creative evolution, and his emotional ties to the Philippines. S...

item.title: Man loses 322lbs through surgery, diet and exercise without weight-loss drugs
item.description: Kashif Jeremiah Rodney, a 36-year-old from Pennsylvania, transformed his life after reaching a life-threatening weight of 562lbs. Struggling with obesity since childhood, Rodney experienced severe mob...

item.title: Gov. Sarah Huckabee Sanders Discusses Politics Over Arkansas BBQ with Jonathan Martin
item.description: In this Politico video from March 10, 2026, Arkansas Governor Sarah Huckabee Sanders sits down with political journalist Jonathan Martin for a casual conversation blending politics and the state's ren...

item.title: Fatal Fire in Echo Bay Claims Two Lives
item.description: A tragic fire in Echo Bay, Northern Ontario, has claimed the lives of two individuals. The incident occurred recently, though specific details regarding the cause of the fire and the identities of the...

item.title: Reconsidering eThekwini’s Public Symbols and Memorials in a Post-Apartheid Context
item.description: In Durban, the vandalised elephant sculptures by Andries Botha, intended to celebrate African heritage ahead of the 2010 Fifa World Cup, now reflect a city struggling with decay and mismanagement. The...

item.title: Understanding Preeclampsia: Risks, Symptoms, and Care During Pregnancy
item.description: Preeclampsia na serious condition wey fit affect many organs during pregnancy, including kidneys, liver, brain, eyes, lungs, and even di baby for womb. E dey usually show after 20 weeks of pregnancy w...

item.title: Challenges facing the Bondi antisemitism royal commission
item.description: The Bondi royal commission into antisemitism faces significant hurdles, largely stemming from its origins and political context. Initiated under pressure rather than genuine governmental intent, the c...

item.title: Flight Operations Temporarily Suspended at Four Washington DC-Area Airports Due to Chemical Odour
item.description: On the evening of March 13, 2026, four major airports in the Washington D.C. area, including Ronald Reagan Washington National Airport, Washington Dulles International Airport, Baltimore-Washington In...

item.title: Geita Gold Mining launches network to support women in mining
item.description: Geita Gold Mining Limited (GGML), the largest gold mine in Tanzania and part of AngloGold Ashanti, recently launched the African Business Unit Women Network and Allies (AWNA). The initiative aims to s...

item.title: PTI demands immediate medical treatment for Imran Khan, threatens nationwide action
item.description: Islamabad – Leaders of Pakistan Tehreek-e-Insaf (PTI) have voiced serious concerns about the deteriorating health of their jailed founder and former Prime Minister, Imran Khan. At a press conference i...

item.title: APC Lawmaker Clement Jimbo Denies Any Plans to Join ADC
item.description: Clement Jimbo, wey dey represent Abak/Etim Ekpo/Ika Federal Constituency for Akwa Ibom State for House of Representatives, don come out sharply reject claim say him wan leave APC join African Democrat...
